reviews.comment:
Mala atención en el área de lavadero, no te explicaban cómo era el procedimiento sobre todos los empleados que lavaban, me entregaron el auto todo mojado incluso las butacas. Ni siquiera perfume y mal aspirado, nunca más

(Translated by Google)
Poor service at the car wash area. They didn't explain the procedure to all the employees who were washing. They handed me the car completely wet, even the seats. There wasn't even perfume and the vacuuming was poor. Never again.
